title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For March 2023
text: NOBL started the year off with a gain of 3.23% in January; it is thus far not faring as well in February, but the ETF is still positive year-to-date. I present 3 strategies that can theoretically beat the dividend aristocrat index in the long term.
